package handler

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Positive scenario for validation_error_response_shape_inconsistent.
// Rule intent: Handlers in the same API module that emit different validation error contracts.

// CreateUserHandler returns errors with shape {"error": "message"}
func CreateUserHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	name := c.PostForm("name")
	if name == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "name is required"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"message": "user created"})
}

// UpdateUserHandler returns errors with shape {"errors": ["message1", "message2"]}
func UpdateUserHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	name := c.PostForm("name")
	email := c.PostForm("email")

	var errs []string
	if name == "" {
		errs = append(errs, "name is required")
	}
	if email == "" {
		errs = append(errs, "email is required")
	}
	if len(errs) > 0 {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"errors": errs})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "user updated"})
}

// DeleteUserHandler returns errors with shape {"message": "...", "code": 400}
func DeleteUserHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	if id == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"message": "id is required", "code": 400})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "user deleted"})
}

// ListUsersHandler returns errors with shape {"detail": "..."}
func ListUsersHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	page := c.Query("page")
	if page == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"detail": "page query parameter is required"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"users": []string{}})
}
